message:
test(engine): expand runtime_image_contract deep integration to 26 tests

Add 9 deep integration tests covering ImageRegistry lifecycle (create,
register, lookup, duplicate rejection, byte tracking, ready filtering,
content hash determinism, warm-start selection) and ImageEvictionReason
serde roundtrip and display uniqueness.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
